title: IIM Ahmedabad is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: IIM Ahmedabad is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
IIM Ahmedabad, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Ahmedabad:
IIM Ahmedabad is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Ahmedabad!
